name: agrosmart-platform
description: AgroSmart - Plataforma de agricultura urbana inteligente

scripts.dev: npx kill-port 8090 3000 5173 && npx dotenv-cli -e .env -- concurrently -n client,server,go-ai -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:go"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server

author: NovaDickTeam
